ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(ISPICKVAL(CCR_Type__c ,'Concession Request - Returns'), OR(ISBLANK(Opportunity__c), ISBLANK(Asset__c), ISBLANK(Account_Name__c),ISBLANK( Return_Reasons__c)))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Account, Opportunity, Asset # & Debook Reason fields are required for CCR type "Concession Request - Returns"
